languages.text: "Последняя запись повествует про осаду Даргонуса, но такого исторического события нет в хрониках".
"The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."
languages.original_text: "Последняя запись повествует про осаду Даргонуса, но такого исторического события нет в хрониках".

traits.locale_text: "The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."
"The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."
"The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."

languages.text: “最后一篇记录提到了达戈努斯的围城战，可编年史里根本没有记载这场战争。”
languages.original_text: "The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."

traits.locale_text: “最后一篇记录提到了达戈努斯的围城战，可编年史里根本没有记载这场战争。”

languages.text: «En la última anotación se menciona el asedio de Dargonus, pero no existe constancia de tal suceso histórico en las crónicas».
languages.original_text: "The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."

traits.locale_text: «En la última anotación se menciona el asedio de Dargonus, pero no existe constancia de tal suceso histórico en las crónicas».

languages.text: « La dernière entrée évoque un siège de Dargonus, mais les chroniques ne mentionnent pas un tel événement. »
languages.original_text: "The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."

traits.locale_text: « La dernière entrée évoque un siège de Dargonus, mais les chroniques ne mentionnent pas un tel événement. »

languages.text: "Der letzte Eintrag handelt von der Belagerung von Dargonus, aber ein derartiges historisches Ereignis wird in den Chroniken nicht erwähnt."
languages.original_text: "The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."

traits.locale_text: "Der letzte Eintrag handelt von der Belagerung von Dargonus, aber ein derartiges historisches Ereignis wird in den Chroniken nicht erwähnt."

languages.text: "Son girdi, Dargonus kuşatmasından bahsediyor ama vakayinamelerde böyle bir tarihî olaydan söz edilmiyor."
languages.original_text: "The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."

traits.locale_text: "Son girdi, Dargonus kuşatmasından bahsediyor ama vakayinamelerde böyle bir tarihî olaydan söz edilmiyor."

languages.text: 「最後の記録はドラゴナス城の包囲戦についてだが、歴史書にはそのような出来事はない」
languages.original_text: "The final entry tells of a siege of Dargonus, but such a historical event is not in the chronicles."

traits.locale_text: 「最後の記録はドラゴナス城の包囲戦についてだが、歴史書にはそのような出来事はない」
